steps.title: Convert the growth factor
steps.content: A $6\%$ increase means each month has $100\%+6\%=106\%$ of the previous month's total. As a decimal, the monthly multiplier is $1.06$.

steps.title: Build the exponential model
steps.content: The initial value is $900$ customers. After $m$ months, multiply by $1.06$ a total of $m$ times. $$c=900(1.06)^m$$ The answer is B.
